name: Woking Athletic Track (Sports Box)
metaTitle: Woking Athletics Track Sportsbox Stadium Information & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check the latest wind speed and stadium information for the Woking Athletics Track at Woking Sportsbox.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: Monday to Friday 06:00 - 22:30, Saturday 08:00 - 20:00, Sunday 08:00 - 21:30 (Check for club bookings).

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Casual track use sessions available. Typically around £6.00 for adult non-members.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: On-site parking is available for visitors and members at the Woking Sportsbox.

trackInfo.heading: Address
trackInfo.text: Woking Sportsbox, Egley Road, Mayford, Woking, GU22 0AF

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Visit the official facility page for current timetables and casual session availability.
